steps.title: Identify the clause structure
steps.content: The blank appears within a subordinate clause: “as [blank] sediment.” This structure requires a subject pronoun and finite verb in the blank.

steps.title: Apply pronoun agreement
steps.content:
Pronoun-antecedent agreement requires the pronoun to match “rivers” (plural), making they correct with the verb accumulate.

The other options violate this rule by using singular pronouns or an inappropriate first-person perspective.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
